title: HORYZONEA
description: Zifiv & Co. modpacks which is mainly focused on Create and Cobblemon.
body:
## **🌍HORYZONEA** is a modpack used by Zifiv and its friends

The modpack is mainly based on **Cobblemon**, **Create** and **Apotheosis**.

The main goal of the modpack is to create an environment with mods I like to play with my friends.

- Cobblemon is for having companions and now some cool mounts.
- Create with many addons to create unique automated factory and automate somes stuffs.
- Apotheosis with many combat/bosses mods to have an unique way to create an adventure.
